jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Dineout
jsonLd.description:
We at Dineout are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dineout:
Dineout is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
